case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. VERONICA ELIZABETH BRAN BARRIOS

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BARRIOS, VERONICA ELIZABETH BRAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-27-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. REPRESENTED BY BERENICE MEDINA, SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VERONICA ELIZABETH BRAN BARRIOS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARRIOS, VERONICA ELIZABETH BRAN $2,145.84 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,320.84 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) BERENICE MEDINA, SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $51.03 ACCRUED INTEREST, $300.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT BARRIOS, VERONICA ELIZABETH BRAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $150.00 - SERVED JUL-25-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARRIOS, VERONICA ELIZABETH BRAN
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BARRIOS, VERONICA ELIZABETH BRAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,145.84 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BARRIOS, VERONICA ELIZABETH BRAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-27-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
